product.name: Midnight Margherita
product.description: A perfect blend of simplicity and flavor, this pizza features a golden, thin-crust base topped with rich tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, and fragrant basil leaves. Baked to perfection, its melty cheese and aromatic herbs create a comforting, classic taste that’s perfect for late-night cravings.

product.name: Smoky Bourbon BBQ Burger
product.description: Sink your teeth into a juicy, perfectly grilled beef patty glazed with a rich smoky bourbon BBQ sauce. Topped with melted cheddar, crispy onion rings, fresh lettuce, and ripe tomatoes, all sandwiched between a toasted brioche bun. Every bite delivers a smoky, tangy, and slightly sweet flavor explosion that’s irresistible for burger lovers.

product.name: Golden Tiger Roll Sushi
product.description: The Golden Tiger Roll is a decadent sushi roll filled with crispy shrimp tempura, creamy avocado, and often cream cheese, then topped with spicy crab, drizzled with spicy mayo and eel sauce, and finished with a crunchy, flavorful garnish.

product.name: Saffron Butter Prawns
product.description: Succulent prawns gently sautéed in a rich saffron-infused butter sauce, finished with a touch of cream and aromatic spices

product.name: Paneer Tikka Masala Deluxe
product.description: Char-grilled cubes of marinated paneer simmered in a luxurious, spiced tomato-cream gravy with peppers, onions, and aromatic herbs

product.name: Lemon Garlic Butter Salmon
product.description: Fresh salmon fillet pan-seared and finished in a silky lemon-garlic butter sauce, accented with herbs for a bright, melt-in-the-mouth flavor.

product.name: Wild Mushroom Risotto
product.description: Creamy Arborio rice slowly cooked with a medley of wild mushrooms, finished with Parmesan, fresh herbs and a drizzle of truffle oil.

product.name: Herb-Cristed Chicken Supreme
product.description: Tender chicken breast coated in a fragrant herb crust, oven-roasted to perfection and served with a light jus and seasonal accompaniments..

product.name: Pistachio Rose Delight
product.description: A delicate fusion of creamy pistachio and fragrant rose, layered into a luscious dessert finished with nuts and a hint of sweetness.

product.name: Spicy Volcano Maki
product.description: A fiery sushi roll packed with spicy tuna and avocado, topped with a baked creamy seafood mix and drizzled with tangy volcano sauce for a bold, erupting flavor..

product.name: Smoky Bourbon BBQ Burger
product.description: Juicy beef patty glazed with smoky bourbon BBQ sauce, layered with caramelized onions, cheddar cheese, and crispy bacon in a brioche bun.

product.name: Classic Cheese Burst Burger
product.description: A timeless favorite with double cheese slices, lettuce, tomatoes, and a perfectly grilled patty topped with creamy mayo.

product.name: Spicy Jalapeño Crunch Burger
product.description: Loaded with fiery jalapeños, pepper jack cheese, crispy nachos, and spicy chipotle mayo for a crunchy, bold kick.

product.name: Mushroom Swiss Burger
product.description: Savory sautéed mushrooms paired with melted Swiss cheese and a tender beef patty, served in a soft sesame bun.

product.name: Crispy Veggie Delight Burger
product.description: Crispy veggie patty topped with fresh lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, and a tangy mint mayo sauce in a toasted bun.

product.name: Kung Pao Chicken
product.description: A classic Sichuan dish made with stir-fried chicken, peanuts, vegetables, and chili peppers in a tangy spicy sauce.

product.name: Sweet and Sour Pork
product.description: Crispy pork pieces tossed with pineapple, bell peppers, and onions in a sweet and tangy sauce.

product.name: Chow Mein
product.description: Stir-fried noodles with vegetables, soy sauce, and your choice of chicken, beef, or shrimp.

product.name: Mapo Tofu
product.description: A spicy Sichuan delicacy with soft tofu, minced pork, and chili bean paste in a bold sauce.

product.name: Spring Rolls
product.description: Crispy rolls filled with vegetables and served with a sweet chili dipping sauce.

product.name: Hot and Sour Soup
product.description: A comforting soup with mushrooms, tofu, bamboo shoots, and egg ribbons in a hot and sour broth.

product.name: Dim Sum Dumplings
product.description: Steamed dumplings stuffed with shrimp and pork, served with soy dipping sauce.

product.name: Beijing Duck
product.description: Crispy roasted duck served with pancakes, hoisin sauce, and sliced scallions.

product.name: Fried Rice
product.description: Wok-fried rice with eggs, vegetables, soy sauce, and your choice of chicken or shrimp.

product.name: Sesame Chicken
product.description: Crispy chicken bites glazed in a sweet soy and sesame sauce, garnished with sesame seeds.

product.name: Crispy Chilli Baby Corn
product.description: Baby corn deep-fried until golden and tossed in a tangy, spicy sauce with onions, capsicum, and spring onions.

product.name: Chicken Manchurian
product.description: Juicy chicken meatballs simmered in a flavorful Manchurian sauce with garlic, soy, and green onions — served with fried rice or noodles.
